description_long: This is a three-seater couch with a sturdy wooden frame and cylindrical, turned wood legs and armrests. The seat and backrest are divided into three distinct, rectangular cushions, all upholstered in a textured red fabric with a subtle diamond or chevron pattern. The armrests are made of exposed wood, matching the legs and the horizontal support bar at the back. The backrest is slightly reclined and the cushions appear thick and plush, suggesting comfort. There are no visible accent or throw pillows, and the overall design is simple yet functional, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments. The couch's construction and materials indicate it is both durable and visually appealing.
description: A three-seater couch with a wooden frame, turned wood legs and armrests, and red textured cushions divided into three sections. The design is sturdy, comfortable, and visually simple.
description_view_0: Front view showing three red seat and back cushions, wooden armrests, and the full width of the couch.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the cushions and the cylindrical wooden armrest and leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the horizontal wooden support bar and the back of the three red cushions.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile of the cushions and wooden armrest and leg.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three seat cushions and three back cushions, all rectangular and aligned, attached or integrated with no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Textured red fabric with a subtle diamond or chevron pattern, no visible decorative stitching or tufting.
attribute_leg_style: Exposed, cylindrical, turned wood legs of medium height, matching the armrest supports.
attribute_armrest_design: Straight, horizontal wooden armrests at seat height, cylindrical in shape, matching the legs.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, divided backrest with three rectangular, cushioned sections, slightly reclined and attached.
